selected_rows_with_status_count: How many selected rows have status "{status_label}"?
Count the selected record rows whose status is "{status_label}".
What is the number of rows that are selected and have status "{status_label}"?
How many checked rows show status "{status_label}"?
Determine how many rows are both selected and marked with status "{status_label}".
enabled_action_for_type_count: How many rows with Type "{type_label}" have the "{action_label}" action enabled?
Count the rows where Type is "{type_label}" and the "{action_label}" action is enabled.
What is the number of "{type_label}" rows with an enabled "{action_label}" action?
How many rows have Type "{type_label}" and an active "{action_label}" button?
Determine how many record rows are Type "{type_label}" with "{action_label}" enabled.
value_threshold_in_group_count: In the "{section_name}" section, how many rows have Size at least {size_threshold_mb} MB?
Looking only at "{section_name}", count the rows with Size greater than or equal to {size_threshold_mb} MB.
Within the "{section_name}" section, what is the number of rows whose Size is at least {size_threshold_mb} MB?
How many rows in "{section_name}" have Size >= {size_threshold_mb} MB?
For the "{section_name}" section, determine how many rows meet or exceed {size_threshold_mb} MB.

global.json_output_contract: Return a JSON object with "annotation" and "answer".
global.json_output_contract_answer_only: Return a JSON object with "answer" only.

query:selected_rows_with_status_count.object_description: a sectioned record table in a desktop application
query:selected_rows_with_status_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the integer count of selected rows with the requested status
query:selected_rows_with_status_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes in image pixel coordinates around every counted row

query:enabled_action_for_type_count.object_description: a sectioned record table in a desktop application
query:enabled_action_for_type_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the integer count of rows with the requested type and enabled action
query:enabled_action_for_type_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes in image pixel coordinates around every counted row

query:value_threshold_in_group_count.object_description: a sectioned record table in a desktop application
query:value_threshold_in_group_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the integer count of rows in the requested section whose Size is at least the threshold
query:value_threshold_in_group_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes in image pixel coordinates around every counted row
